| AMD / ROCm | AITER: AI Tensor Engine for ROCm | 2026 | ROCm AITER project | AMD AITER (AI Tensor Engine for ROCm) provides C++/Python APIs and optimized Triton, Composable Kernel, and assembly operators for ROCm inference, including attention, MoE, GEMM, quantization, and communication kernels; it integrates with vLLM and SGLang. | [primary](https://github.com/ROCm/aiter) |
| KServe | KServe Generative Inference Stack | 2026 | KServe official generative inference documentation | KServe official documentation covering LLMInferenceService, multi-node/multi-GPU inference, model caching, and AI Gateway integration for Kubernetes-based generative serving. | [primary](https://kserve.github.io/website/docs/model-serving/generative-inference/overview) |
|  | v0.23.0 | 2026 | vLLM releases | <h1>vLLM v0.23.0 Release Notes</h1> <p>Please note that Minimax M3 is not yet supported in this version. Please follow <a href="https://recipes.vllm.ai/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3" rel="nofollow">vLLM recipe</a> for usage guides for M3.</p> <h2>Highlights</h2> <p>This release features 408 commits from 200 contributors (63 new)!</p> <ul> <li><strong>DeepSeek-V4 matures across backends</strong>: Following its introduction in v0.22.0, DeepSeek-V4 received another large hardening and optimization pass. Its sparse MLA metadata is now decoupled from DeepSeek-V3.2 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4600962429" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44699" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44699/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44699">#44699</a>), it gained a TRTLLM-gen attention kernel (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" |  | v0.24.0 | 2026 | vLLM releases | <h1>vLLM v0.24.0 Release Notes</h1> <h2>Highlights</h2> <p>This release features 571 commits from 256 contributors (77 new)!</p> <ul> <li><strong>MiniMax-M3</strong>: Added support for the new <strong>MiniMax-M3</strong> model (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4647355834" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45381" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45381/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45381">#45381</a>), with a fast follow-on of BF16/FP8 indexer via MSA (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4680019767" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45892" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45892/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45892">#45892</a>), MXFP4 support (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4680317418" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45896" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45896/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45896">#45896</a>), FP8 sparse GQA (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4669482520" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45744" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45744/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45744">#45744</a>), and extensive AMD/ROCm tuning — mxfp8 MoE/linear on gfx950 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4667972020" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45725" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45725/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45725">#45725</a>), fp8_per_channel for bf16 weights on MI300X (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4676876725" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45854" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45854/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45854">#45854</a>), FP8 KV-cache fix (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4667558262" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45720" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45720/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45720">#45720</a>), and packed-modules mapping (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4672495725" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45794" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45794/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45794">#45794</a>). A MiniMax-M2 perf regression was also fixed (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4684156151" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45935" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45935/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45935">#45935</a>).</li> <li><strong>DeepSeek-V4 keeps maturing</strong>: Following its debut, DeepSeek-V4 received another large optimization pass — a FlashInfer sparse index cache (2–4% TTFT) (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4677606814" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45863" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45863/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45863">#45863</a>), prefill chunk-planning optimization (4% E2E throughput) (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4625430809" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45061" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45061/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45061">#45061</a>), a cluster-cooperative topK kernel for low-latency (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4471755098" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/43008" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/43008/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/43008">#43008</a>), contiguous per-block KV allocations (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4591995621" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44577" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44577/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44577">#44577</a>), TEP=16 for the block-FP8 shared expert (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4689688057" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46001" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46001/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46001">#46001</a>), and native DSA indexer decode for <code>next_n &gt; 2</code> on SM100 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4644349545" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45322" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45322/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45322">#45322</a>). It is now enabled on <strong>SM120</strong> alongside GLM-5.1 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4507838459" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/43477" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/43477/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/43477">#43477</a>), with XPU (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4559603582" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44144" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44144/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44144">#44144</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4587140845" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44517" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44517/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44517">#44517</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4637742183" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45240" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45240/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45240">#45240</a>) and ROCm (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4614520678" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44899" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44899/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44899">#44899</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4627834513" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45103" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45103/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45103">#45103</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4663960710" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45681" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45681/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45681">#45681</a>) attention/MoE paths added.</li> <li><strong>Model Runner V2 (MRv2) continues to expand</strong>: MRv2 now <strong>supports quantized models by default</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4583187242" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44446" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44446/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44446">#44446</a>), enables <strong>GraniteMoE by default</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4652893929" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45461" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45461/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45461">#45461</a>), and gained migration of Qwen + DeepSeek-V2 MoE models (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4448380363" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/42667" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/42667/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/42667">#42667</a>), DFlash speculative decoding (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4592519415" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44586" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44586/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44586">#44586</a>), and more accurate FP32 Gumbel sampling (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4689272752" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45996" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45996/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45996">#45996</a>).</li> <li><strong>Streaming Parser Engine</strong>: A new streaming parser engine unifies tool-call/reasoning parsing across models, with parsers for Qwen3 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4649937169" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45413" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45413/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45413">#45413</a>), MiniMax-M2 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4665415121" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45701" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45701/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45701">#45701</a>), GLM-4.7/5.1/5.2 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4681600062" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45915" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45915/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45915">#45915</a>), and Nemotron V3 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4670206059" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45755" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45755/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45755">#45755</a>).</li> <li><strong>Diffusion LLMs</strong>: Added <strong>DiffusionGemma</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4632249446" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45163" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45163/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45163">#45163</a>), including a CPU path (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4664469583" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45690" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45690/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45690">#45690</a>) and structured-output guardrails for diffusion decoders (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4653073587" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45468" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45468/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45468">#45468</a>).</li> <li><strong>WideEP / DeepEP v2</strong>: Integrated <strong>DeepEP v2</strong> for expert parallelism (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4347375096" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/41183" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/41183/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/41183">#41183</a>), with follow-on robustness fixes (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4719878728" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46404" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46404/hovercard" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4601528744" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44708" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44708/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44708">#44708</a>).</li> </ul> <h3>Security</h3> <p>This release ships another coordinated security-hardening batch (much of it from security researcher <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/jperezdealgaba/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/jperezdealgaba">@jperezdealgaba</a>).</p> <ul> <li><strong>Denial of service</strong>: Audio decompression bomb in the speech-to-text endpoint (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4619655676" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44970" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44970/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44970">#44970</a>), remote DoS via invalid recovered-token reinjection in speculative decoding (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4604481530" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44744" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44744/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44744">#44744</a>), DoS via <code>prompt_embeds</code> on M-RoPE models (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4638292491" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45252" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45252/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45252">#45252</a>), regex-compilation timeout guard in structured outputs (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4629021984" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45118" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45118/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45118">#45118</a>), audio upload size limit before full materialization (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4654741443" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45510" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45510/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45510">#45510</a>), audio decode duration limit in the chat-completions path (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4681034058" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45908" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45908/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45908">#45908</a>).</li> <li><strong>Information disclosure</strong>: int32 truncation in the GGUF dequantize kernels (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4619713678" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44971" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44971/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44971">#44971</a>).</li> <li><strong>Input validation &amp; hardening</strong>: Image EXIF orientation and tRNS transparency handling (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4619786382" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44974" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44974/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44974">#44974</a>), rejection of non-finite <code>temperature</code>/<code>repetition_penalty</code> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4628961888" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45116" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45116/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45116">#45116</a>), <code>sanitize_message</code> applied to Anthropic and STT error paths (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4629067891" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45119" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45119/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45119">#45119</a>).</li> <li><strong>Dependencies</strong>: Upgrade Starlette to ≥ 1.0.1 to fix <a title="CVE-2026-48710" data-hovercard-type="advisory" data-hovercard-url="/advisories/GHSA-86qp-5c8j-p5mr/hovercard" href="https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86qp-5c8j-p5mr">CVE-2026-48710</a> |  | v0.25.0 | 2026 | vLLM releases | <h1>vLLM v0.25.0 Release Notes</h1> <h2>Highlights</h2> <p>This release features 558 commits from 232 contributors (64 new)!</p> <ul> <li><strong>Model Runner V2 is now the default for all dense models</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4582973141" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44443" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44443/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44443">#44443</a>). Building on quantized-model support from the previous release, MRv2 is now the standard execution path, with new support for EVS (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4729200674" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46535" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46535/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46535">#46535</a>), realtime embeddings (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4746942694" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46762" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46762/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46762">#46762</a>), prefix caching for Mamba hybrid models (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4428155736" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/42406" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/42406/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/42406">#42406</a>), multimodal-prefix bidirectional attention (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4761265985" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46942" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46942/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46942">#46942</a>), and dynamic speculative decoding compatible with full CUDA graphs (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4686202847" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45953" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45953/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45953">#45953</a>).</li> <li><strong>PagedAttention has been removed</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4790219382" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47361" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47361/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47361">#47361</a>). The legacy attention implementation is deleted now that V1/MRv2 backends are the standard path.</li> <li><strong>The Transformers modeling backend is now as fast as native vLLM</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4778942021" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47187" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47187/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47187">#47187</a>), and gained FP8 MoE support (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4751229783" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46820" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46820/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46820">#46820</a>), CUDA graph + embed scaling fixes (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4838798886" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/48010" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/48010/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/48010">#48010</a>), and migration of GPTBigCode/Starcoder2 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3743255279" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/30966" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/30966/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/30966">#30966</a>) and RoBERTa (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4796084774" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47452" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47452/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47452">#47452</a>).</li> <li><strong>New models</strong>: LLaVA-OneVision-2 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4607171564" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/44785" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44785/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/44785">#44785</a>), Unlimited OCR (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4731183347" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46564" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46564/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46564">#46564</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4773291378" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47102" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47102/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47102">#47102</a>), MOSS-Transcribe-Diarize (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4818458120" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47729" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47729/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47729">#47729</a>), openai/privacy-filter (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4336949551" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/41026" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/41026/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/41026">#41026</a>), and Hy3 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4779360183" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47192" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47192/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47192">#47192</a>). GLM-5 / DeepSeek-V3.2 landed in the model zoo (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4750419018" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46808" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46808/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46808">#46808</a>) with GLM-5.2 tuning, and MiniMax-M3 gained pipeline parallelism (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4673787019" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/45810" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45810/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/45810">#45810</a>) and NVFP4 support (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4746446884" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46756" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46756/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46756">#46756</a>).</li> <li><strong>New Streaming Parser Engine</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4734469631" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/46610" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46610/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/46610">#46610</a>) — a unified tool-call/reasoning parsing framework, with a new Kimi k2.5/k2.6/k2.7 parser and ports of seed_oss (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4712323290" |  | v0.25.1 | 2026 | vLLM releases | <h1>vLLM v0.25.1</h1> <h2>Highlights</h2> <p>This release features 2 commits from 2 contributors (1 new)!</p> <p>v0.25.1 is a patch release containing two targeted bug fixes on top of v0.25.0.</p> <h3>Bug Fixes</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Avoid blocking model launching when no system FFmpeg is available for TorchCodec</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4830103553" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/47888" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47888/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/47888">#47888</a>). Previously <code>import torchcodec</code> raised a <code>RuntimeError</code> at import time when system FFmpeg was missing, which blocked startup (e.g. <code>vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct</code>) even when TorchCodec was not in use. The error is now deferred to runtime so it only surfaces if TorchCodec is actually needed.</li> <li><strong>Guard mixed-dtype allreduce RMSNorm quant fusions</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4861605008" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/48330" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/48330/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/48330">#48330</a>). The fused FlashInfer allreduce + RMSNorm + static-quantization patterns could match graphs where the activation and RMSNorm weight dtypes differ (e.g. a BF16 residual stream with an FP32 Gemma/Qwen-style RMSNorm weight in NVFP4 models), corrupting the hidden state and producing garbage output such as repeated <code>!!!!!</code> tokens. A dtype-match guard now routes incompatible mixed-dtype graphs to the safe path, while same-dtype models retain the full allreduce + RMSNorm + quant fusion.</li> </ul> <h2>Contributors</h2> <p><a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/Isotr0py/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/Isotr0py">@Isotr0py</a>, <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/hugo-cen/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/hugo-cen">@hugo-cen</a></p> <h2>New Contributors</h2> <ul> <li><a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/hugo-cen/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/hugo-cen">@hugo-cen</a> made their first contribution in <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4861605008" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/48330" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/vllm-project/vllm/pull/48330/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/48330">#48330</a></li> </ul> | [primary](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/releases/tag/v0.25.1) |
|  | v0.5.10 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <h1>Highlights</h1> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Piecewise CUDA Graph Enabled by Default</strong>: Piecewise CUDA graph capture is now the default execution mode, reducing memory overhead and improving throughput for models with complex control flow patterns: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3777709356" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/16331" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/16331/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/16331">#16331</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Elastic EP for Partial Failure Tolerance</strong>: Integrate Elastic NIXL-EP into SGLang, enabling partial failure tolerance for DeepSeek MoE deployments — when a GPU fails, the system redistributes expert weights and continues serving without full restart: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3983704969" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/19248" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19248/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19248">#19248</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3831729259" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/17374" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/17374/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/17374">#17374</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3548336404" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/12068" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/12068/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/12068">#12068</a> <a href="https://lmsys.org/blog/2026-03-25-eep-partial-failure-tolerance/" rel="nofollow">blog</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>GPU Staging Buffer for PD Disaggregation</strong>: Gathers scattered head slices into contiguous memory for bulk RDMA transfer, reducing RDMA request count on GQA models by ~1000x. TPS/GPU on large concurrency increased by ~5x with Prefill TP4+Decode DEP4 on Qwen3.5: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4023136205" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/19890" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19890/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19890">#19890</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>HiSparse for Sparse Attention</strong>: Integrate HiSparse sparse attention backend for efficient long-context inference with reduced compute through sparsity-aware attention: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4056800723" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/20343" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/20343/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/20343">#20343</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>SGLang-Diffusion Update</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Model support: LTX-2, Hunyuan3D-2, Helios</li> <li>Performance improvements on Qwen-image, Z-image increased by 1.5x</li> <li>New platform: macOS</li> <li>New feature: enhance the performance of diffusers backend by integrating all optimization from Cache-DiT</li> <li>SKILLs: feel free to explore the curated skill for developing and optimizing sglang-diffusion!</li> </ul> </li> <li> <p><strong>FlashInfer MXFP8 Kernel Support</strong>: Integrate FlashInfer mxfp8 kernels for GEMM and MoE operations, enabling mixed-precision FP8 inference with higher accuracy through microscaling for RL and general workloads: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4003645722" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/19537" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19537/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19537">#19537</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Transformers 5.3.0 Upgrade</strong>: Major upgrade from transformers 4.57.1 to 5.3.0, unlocking support for the latest model architectures and features from HuggingFace. GLM-5 model is now supported in this image instead of the custom built image: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3858043233" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/17784">#17784</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>DeepSeek V3.2 / GLM-5 Optimization</strong>: <strong>GLM-5 runnable on main branch (with upgraded transformers).</strong> Fused Triton kernel for prefill KV cache fetching, NSA fuse store indexer for K cache, TRT-LLM prefill/decode DSA kernels as default on SM100/SM103, and IndexCache for improved to load title" data-id="4054667309" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/20303" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-id="3970632976" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/19089" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" |  | v0.5.10.post1 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a class="commit-link" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/compare/v0.5.10...v0.5.10.post1"><tt>v0.5.10...v0.5.10.post1</tt></a></p> <p>Bumps flashinfer from v0.6.7.post2 to v0.6.7.post3 to resolve an issue in its jit cubin downloader.</p> | [primary](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/releases/tag/v0.5.10.post1) |
|  | v0.5.11 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <h1>Highlights</h1> <ul> <li> <p><strong>CUDA 13 + Torch 2.11</strong>: Default CUDA version moves to 13.0 across SGLang, sgl-kernel, and Docker images, and PyTorch is upgraded from 2.9 to 2.11 — modernizing the build matrix and unlocking newer kernels: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4124792244" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/21247" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21247/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21247">#21247</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4360846421" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/24162" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24162/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24162">#24162</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4361891127" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/24183" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24183/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24183">#24183</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4319647620" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/23593" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23593/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23593">#23593</a> (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/21498" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/issues/21498/hovercard">tracking issue #21498</a>)</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Speculative Decoding V2 by default</strong>: Spec V2 (with overlap scheduling to hide CPU overhead) is now the default, materially reducing per-step CPU cost for EAGLE/MTP/DFLASH paths: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4111007583" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/21062" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21062/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21062">#21062</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Decode Radix Cache for PD Disaggregation</strong>: Decode-side prefix caching now works under prefill/decode disaggregation, recovering radix-cache hit rates and TTFT savings for long shared prefixes in disaggregated deployments: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4014942552" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/19746" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19746/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/19746">#19746</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Day-0 / New Model Support</strong>: Gemma 4, GLM-5.1, Qwen3.6, MiMo-V2.5 / V2.5-Pro, Ling-2.6-Flash, Mistral Medium 3.5, and Kimi-K2.6 — with cookbook recipes for tuned deployment commands. See <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook" rel="nofollow">docs.sglang.io/cookbook</a>: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4195220645" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/21952" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21952/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21952">#21952</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4333446942" data-permission-text="Title is href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23394">#23394</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>DFLASH Speculative Decoding</strong>: New high-throughput spec-decode kernel from the kernel community, expanded across model backends and AMD ROCm: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4202298455" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/22077" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22077/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22077">#22077</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4224624852" data-permission-text="Title is href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22358">#22358</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4223039763" data-permission-text="Title is href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23553">#23553</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>FA3 Kernels from the Kernel Community</strong>: Drop-in FA3 kernels contributed by the community, integrated alongside FA4 to give users a high-performance option that's easy to maintain: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4091850480" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/20796" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/20796/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/20796">#20796</a></p> </li> <li> <p><strong>LoRA support for DeepSeek-V3 and Kimi-K2</strong>: LoRA now works on the largest MLA-based MoE models, including DeepSeek-V3 MLA LoRA and Kimi K2 — enabling adapter-based fine-tuning of frontier-scale models: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4222219107" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/22323" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" All-reduce + RMSNorm fusion under CP for end-to-end speedups, plus support for <code>moe_dp_size = 1</code> paired with arbitrary <code>attention_cp_size</code> so MoE and attention parallelism can be tuned independently: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4124813779" data-permission-text="Title is private" |  | v0.5.12.post1 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <p>v0.5.12.post1 is a stability patch on top of v0.5.12. It cherry-picks 12 fixes — primarily for DeepSeek V4 — onto the release branch.</p> <h1>Bug Fixes</h1> <h2>DeepSeek V4</h2> <ul> <li>DSV4-Pro emits garbled text during single-token decode on B200/B300 (fix <code>deep_gemm</code> UE8M0 scale-packing path by ceiling activation scales before packing): <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4473942693" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25733" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25733/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25733">#25733</a></li> <li>DSV4 + EAGLE/MTP in disaggregation decode crashes around 2000 requests with a SWA allocator assertion (recycled KV pages kept stale sliding-window mappings): <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4480739038" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25805" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25805/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25805">#25805</a></li> <li>DSV4 NSA prefill context-parallel (<code>--enable-nsa-prefill-context-parallel --nsa-prefill-cp-mode round-robin-split</code>) in <code>--disaggregation-mode prefill</code>: scheduler crash at startup: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4453649926" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25396" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25396/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25396">#25396</a></li> <li>DSV4 HiSparse + <code>SGLANG_OPT_USE_COMPRESSOR_V2=1</code>: GSM8K accuracy restored from 0.825 → 0.960: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4468904214" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25646" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25646/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25646">#25646</a></li> <li>DSV4 PD disaggregation now works with pipeline parallelism &gt; 1 (removed stale <code>pp_size=1</code> assertion): <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4476624441" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25771" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25771/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25771">#25771</a></li> <li>DSV4-Flash with <code>--load-format dummy</code> + FlashInfer mxfp4 hits CUDA illegal memory access during CUDA-graph capture (the integer <code>HashTopK.tid2eid</code> lookup table was left uninitialized by dummy load): <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4485440625" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25892" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25892/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25892">#25892</a></li> <li>DSV4 HiCache + <code>SGLANG_OPT_CACHE_SWA_TRANSLATION=1</code> returns stale translation indices after a cache rebuild, causing OOB writes / wrong outputs: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4485312264" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25889" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25889/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25889">#25889</a></li> </ul> <h2>Disaggregation</h2> <ul> <li>[PD][NIXL] Always send aux on <code>is_last</code>; only expect state when truthy: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4473279824" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25699" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25699/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25699">#25699</a></li> </ul> <h2>Other</h2> <ul> <li>Fix missing <code>group</code> arg in <code>get_dp_buffer</code>: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4467183998" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25585" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25585/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25585">#25585</a></li> </ul> <h1>Performance</h1> <ul> <li>DSV4: warm MHC token-count buckets at startup (gated to <code>SGLANG_OPT_DEEPGEMM_HC_PRENORM=1</code> + <code>SGLANG_OPT_USE_TILELANG_MHC_PRE=1</code> + hybrid SWA) to eliminate 20–40s cold-bucket forward stalls: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4481250633" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25810" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25810/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25810">#25810</a></li> <li>DSV4-Pro: precompile a DeepGEMM branch for <code>_dispatch_bf16_fp32_backend</code> to cut runtime JIT compile cost: <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4484112840" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25860" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25860/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25860">#25860</a></li> </ul> <h1>Dependencies</h1> <ul> <li>Use <code>[cu13]</code> extra for <code>nvidia-cutlass-dsl</code> (default to CUDA 13; required for sm_103 / B300): <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4466792416" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/25576" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25576/hovercard" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25576">#25576</a></li> </ul> <p><strong>All PRs included in this release</strong>: <a class="commit-link" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/compare/v0.5.12...v0.5.12.post1"><tt>v0.5.12...v0.5.12.post1</tt></a></p> <p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a class="commit-link" href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/compare/v0.5.12...v0.5.12.post1"><tt>v0.5.12...v0.5.12.post1</tt></a></p> | [primary](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/releases/tag/v0.5.12.post1) |
|  | v0.5.13 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <h2>Highlights</h2> <p><strong>New Model Support</strong>:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Autoregressive</strong>: <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/NVIDIA/Nemotron3-Ultra" rel="nofollow">Nemotron 3 Ultra</a> (Day-0, <a href="https://www.lmsys.org/blog/2026-06-04-nvidia-run-nemotron-3-ultra/" rel="nofollow">blog</a>), <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/StepFun/Step-3.7-Flash" rel="nofollow">Step-3.7-Flash</a>, Command A+</li> <li><strong>Diffusion</strong>: <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/Cosmos/Cosmos3" rel="nofollow">Cosmos3</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/LingBot-World/LingBot-World" rel="nofollow">LingBot-World</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/SANA-WM/SANA-WM" rel="nofollow">SANA-WM</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/Ernie-Image/Ernie-Image" rel="nofollow">Ernie-Image</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/FLUX/FLUX" rel="nofollow">FLUX.2-Klein 4B/9B</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/Ideogram/Ideogram4" rel="nofollow">Ideogram 4</a></li> </ul> <p><strong>Spec V2 is now the default speculative-decoding path</strong>: Tree drafting with topk &gt; 1 is production-ready across the triton / FA3 / MLA / aiter backends, including <code>page_size &gt; 1</code> and Mamba/hybrid-linear models (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26997" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26997/hovercard">#26997</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26972" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26972/hovercard">#26972</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27463" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27463/hovercard">#27463</a>). Spec V1 is deprecated, with EAGLE/MTP now running on the unified V2 worker (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25464" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25464/hovercard">#25464</a>), and topk = 1 drafting is faster (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26397" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26397/hovercard">#26397</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26424" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26424/hovercard">#26424</a>).</p> <p><strong>Lower per-step scheduler overhead</strong>: Unified async value passing through FutureMap plus moving prefill input transfer onto the forward stream reduced per-step launch overhead and improved stability under high concurrency (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25945" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25945/hovercard">#25945</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25879" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25879/hovercard">#25879</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26380" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26380/hovercard">#26380</a>).</p> <p><strong>Piecewise &amp; Breakable CUDA Graph coverage</strong>: Piecewise (PCG) and Breakable (BCG) CUDA Graph capture more of the model to cut per-step kernel-launch overhead, now extended to DSA models, Kimi-K2.5, and DeepSeek V4: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23351" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23351/hovercard">#23351</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26382" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26382/hovercard">#26382</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25195" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25195/hovercard">#25195</a>.</p> <p><strong>Faster Qwen 3.5 on Blackwell</strong>: New FlashInfer Gated DeltaNet (GDN) kernels and a CuTeDSL GDN prefill kernel speed up Qwen 3.5 on Blackwell GPUs: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22921" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22921/hovercard">#22921</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23273" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23273/hovercard">#23273</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26200" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26200/hovercard">#26200</a>.</p> <p><strong>HiCache for hybrid models by default</strong>: HybridModel (SWA/Mamba) launches HiCache through UnifiedTree by default, bringing hierarchical KV-cache offload to sliding-window and Mamba hybrids out of the box: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27759" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27759/hovercard">#27759</a>.</p> <p><strong>Heterogeneous CPU + GPU EPD disaggregation (with Intel)</strong>: Offload VLM vision encoding onto Intel Xeon CPUs alongside GPUs, with up to ~1.3x P99 TTFT and request-throughput gains under load. (<a href="https://www.lmsys.org/blog/2026-06-01-hetero-epd/" rel="nofollow">blog</a>)</p> <p><strong>MoRI on AMD Instinct MI355X (with AMD)</strong>: Cost-competitive DeepSeek-R1 disaggregated inference via AMD's MoRI communication library, $0.169 per million tokens at 129 tok/s/user. (<a href="https://www.lmsys.org/blog/2026-05-28-mori/" rel="nofollow">blog</a>)</p> <p><strong>DeepSeek V4 — context parallelism &amp; sparse-attention kernels</strong>: Building on the v0.5.12 Day-0 path, v0.5.13 extends DeepSeek-V4 to context-parallel serving and adds its sparse-attention kernels:</p> <ul> <li>Context Parallel + MTP: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24934" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24934/hovercard">#24934</a></li> <li>Context Parallel + fused MoE kernel (non-DeepEP): <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24947" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24947/hovercard">#24947</a></li> <li>Sparse FlashMLA via <code>flash_mla_sparse_fwd</code>: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25418" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25418/hovercard">#25418</a></li> <li>FP4 indexer support: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26209" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26209/hovercard">#26209</a></li> <li>SM120 support: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24692" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24692/hovercard">#24692</a></li> <li>DeepEP waterfill load balancing: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25391" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25391/hovercard">#25391</a></li> <li>MHC kernel warmup: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25810" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25810/hovercard">#25810</a></li> <li>Breakable CUDA Graph for DeepSeek V4: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25195" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25195/hovercard">#25195</a></li> <li>Backed by sgl-kernel 0.4.3 exposing <code>sgl_kernel.flashmla</code>: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26421" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26421/hovercard">#26421</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26132" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26132/hovercard">#26132</a></li> </ul> <p>See the <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/DeepSeek/DeepSeek-V4" rel="nofollow">DeepSeek-V4 cookbook</a> for tuned deployment commands.</p> <p><strong>SGLang-Diffusion — realtime &amp; progressive resolution</strong>: OpenAI-style realtime video generation with msgpack frame streaming and a standalone browser WebUI (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26954" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26954/hovercard">#26954</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26959" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26959/hovercard">#26959</a>), continuous camera controls + super-resolution controls (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27026" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27026/hovercard">#27026</a>, <a |  | v0.5.13.post1 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <p>Release v0.5.13.post1</p> | [primary](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/releases/tag/v0.5.13.post1) |
|  | v0.5.14 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <h1>Highlights</h1> <p>New Model Support: <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/GLM/GLM-5.2" rel="nofollow">GLM-5.2</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/LiquidAI/LFM2.5" rel="nofollow">LiquidAI LFM2.5</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code" rel="nofollow">Kimi-K2.7-Code</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Poolside/Laguna-M.1" rel="nofollow">Poolside Laguna-M.1</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Google/DiffusionGemma" rel="nofollow">DiffusionGemma</a>, Zyphra ZAYA1, MiMo-V2-ASR</p> <p><strong>DeepSeek-V4 on GB300 since Day 0</strong>: 5x higher throughput at the same interactivity, serving DeepSeek-V4 on NVIDIA GB300 with SGLang (<a href="https://pytorch.org/blog/serving-deepseek-v4-on-gb300-with-sglang-5x-higher-throughput-at-the-same-interactivity-since-day-0/" rel="nofollow">blog</a>).</p> <p><strong>Waterfill &amp; LPLB MoE load balancing</strong>: Two dispatch-time load-balancing methods for DeepEP expert parallelism: Waterfill for shared-expert dispatch and LPLB for redundant expert replicas, improving throughput for DeepSeek-V3/R1 and DeepSeek-V4 (<a href="https://www.lmsys.org/blog/2026-06-26-waterfill-lplb" rel="nofollow">blog</a>).</p> <p><strong>KDA CuteDSL prefill kernel on Blackwell (SM100)</strong>: New CuteDSL prefill kernel for Kimi-Linear (KDA), 1.08-1.52x faster than the Triton path via a reusable scratch workspace, plus a cuda-graph padding fix (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27488" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27488/hovercard">#27488</a>); see the <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Moonshotai/Kimi-Linear" rel="nofollow">Kimi-Linear cookbook</a>.</p> <p><strong>Linear-attention prefix-cache memory savings</strong>: An int8 checkpoint pool stores recurrent states compactly in the Mamba radix cache, substantially increasing prefix-cache capacity for KDA / GDN models (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28185" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28185/hovercard">#28185</a>); the speculative conv-window intermediate cache is deduplicated with a sliding-window layout, halving its footprint with no numerical change (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28302" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28302/hovercard">#28302</a>).</p> <p><strong>LPLB: linear-programming load balancer for MoE expert parallelism</strong>: Balances token routing across redundant expert replicas by solving a per-layer LP; opt-in via <code>--ep-dispatch-algorithm=lp</code>, default behavior unchanged (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24515" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24515/hovercard">#24515</a>).</p> <p><strong>MSCCL++ integration &amp; MNNVL allreduce fusion</strong>: MSCCL++ migrates to the upstream <code>mscclpp</code> Python package (Executor + DSL compiler) with auto-tuned collectives for TP=8 single-node and TP=16 two-node (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22734" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22734/hovercard">#22734</a>); FlashInfer fused allreduce + residual + RMSNorm re-enables an MNNVL backend behind <code>--flashinfer-allreduce-fusion-backend</code> (<code>auto</code> / <code>trtllm</code> / <code>mnnvl</code>), fixing the piecewise-CUDA-graph interaction (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23402" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/23402/hovercard">#23402</a>).</p> <p><strong>Nemotron DP attention + MTP</strong>: Data-parallel attention for the hybrid Nemotron-H (Mamba2 + full attention + MoE), plus MTP support (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24955" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/24955/hovercard">#24955</a>); see the <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/NVIDIA/Nemotron3-Ultra" rel="nofollow">Nemotron 3 Ultra cookbook</a>.</p> <p><strong>AMD: breakable CUDA graph on ROCm/HIP</strong>: The breakable CUDA graph execution path now runs on AMD GPUs (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28173" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28173/hovercard">#28173</a>).</p> <p><strong>NVFP4 MoE for DeepSeek-V4</strong>: Adds an NVFP4 MoE quantization path for DeepSeek-V4 on Blackwell for higher MoE throughput; enable with <code>--moe-runner-backend flashinfer_trtllm_routed</code> (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25820" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25820/hovercard">#25820</a>); see the <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/DeepSeek/DeepSeek-V4" rel="nofollow">DeepSeek-V4 cookbook</a>.</p> <p><strong>DeepSeek-V4 decode &amp; quantization optimizations</strong>: FP8 group quantization now emits power-of-two (UE8M0) scales directly from the per-token group-quant kernel, dropping a separate rounding pass (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26766" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26766/hovercard">#26766</a>); MLA decode q-heads are padded to 64 under attention-TP so FlashMLA dispatches the ~2x cheaper head64 kernel instead of head128 (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27954" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27954/hovercard">#27954</a>); the MHC prenorm kernel is prewarmed at startup to remove the first-run JIT slowdown on a fresh server (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27986" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27986/hovercard">#27986</a>); and BF16 mixed-dtype compression states are supported on the C4 / C128 paths (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27277" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27277/hovercard">#27277</a>); see the <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/DeepSeek/DeepSeek-V4" rel="nofollow">DeepSeek-V4 cookbook</a>.</p> <p>Full release notes by category below.</p> <h2>New Model Support</h2> <ul> <li>GLM-5.2: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28437" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28437/hovercard">#28437</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/GLM/GLM-5.2" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>LiquidAI LFM2.5: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27409" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27409/hovercard">#27409</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/LiquidAI/LFM2.5" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>Kimi-K2.7-Code: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28064" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28064/hovercard">#28064</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>Poolside Laguna-M.1: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28661" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28661/hovercard">#28661</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28400" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28400/hovercard">#28400</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Poolside/Laguna-M.1" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>DiffusionGemma: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27824" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27824/hovercard">#27824</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Google/DiffusionGemma" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>Zyphra ZAYA1: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26347" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26347/hovercard">#26347</a> (cookbook wip)</li> <li>MiMo-V2-ASR: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26278" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26278/hovercard">#26278</a> (cookbook wip)</li> </ul> <h2>DeepSeek V4</h2> <ul> <li>[NVIDIA] Support NVFP4 MoE for DeepSeek-V4: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25820" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25820/hovercard">#25820</a></li> <li>[DeepSeek-V4] Fuse UE8M0 scale rounding into FP8 group quantization: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26766" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26766/hovercard">#26766</a></li> <li>[NPU] Add Ascend NPU support for DeepSeek-V4: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25144" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/25144/hovercard">#25144</a></li> <li>Deepseek v4: support mixed dtype compression states: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27277" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27277/hovercard">#27277</a></li> <li>[AMD] Feat: Add prefill context parallel support for deepseek v4 unified kv attention: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27928" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27928/hovercard">#27928</a></li> <li>DeepSeek-V4 Online Compress support MTP: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26471" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26471/hovercard">#26471</a></li> <li>[dsv4] Pad MLA decode q-heads to 64 (not full n_heads) for FlashMLA head64 kernel: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27954" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27954/hovercard">#27954</a></li> <li>[dsv4] Prewarm MHC prenorm kernel at startup: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27986" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27986/hovercard">#27986</a></li> <li>[LoRA] Support DSA indexer LoRA targets for GLM-5.1 / DeepSeek-V3.2-family models: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28110" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28110/hovercard">#28110</a></li> <li>Add DeepSeek V4 MTP acceptance length checks: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28098" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28098/hovercard">#28098</a></li> </ul> <h2>Speculative Decoding</h2> <ul> <li>[Spec] Add sync-free <code>fast_prefill_plan</code> for EAGLE draft-extend CUDA graph: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28854" data-hovercard-type="pull_request"
