href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/compare/v0.5.13...v0.5.14"><tt>v0.5.13...v0.5.14</tt></a></p> | [primary](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/releases/tag/v0.5.14) |
|  | v0.5.15 | 2026 | SGLang releases | <h1>Highlights</h1> <p><strong>GLM-5.2 NVFP4, tuned for production</strong>: We took time this cycle to tune GLM-5.2 NVFP4 on Blackwell for optimized production serving. It now runs at <strong>500+ tok/s/user on 8x B300, 450 on 4x GB300</strong> (bs=1). Run GLM-5.2 with our <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/GLM/GLM-5.2" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>.</p> <ul> <li><strong>Spec V2 by default</strong>: zero-overhead scheduling via CUDA-graphable DSA draft-extend, dropped D2H/H2D syncs, fused metadata ops. +11% end-to-end TPS (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29413" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29413/hovercard">#29413</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29343" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29343/hovercard">#29343</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29166" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29166/hovercard">#29166</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29077" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29077/hovercard">#29077</a>).</li> <li><strong>IndexShare MTP</strong>: reuses the indexer top-k across draft steps, up to 1.9x lower draft-step cost at long context (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29959" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29959/hovercard">#29959</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29787" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29787/hovercard">#29787</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29654" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29654/hovercard">#29654</a>).</li> <li><strong>TopK V2</strong>: fuses top-k selection with the page-table transform, runtime k up to 2048 (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30274" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30274/hovercard">#30274</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26788" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/26788/hovercard">#26788</a>).</li> <li><strong>Indexer prologue fusion</strong>: 12 kernels to 4, ~8% faster decode at bs=1 (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27705" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27705/hovercard">#27705</a>).</li> <li><strong>GEMM</strong>: shape-specialized JIT router GEMM + CuteDSL BF16 GEMM for Blackwell (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21531" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/21531/hovercard">#21531</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30117" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30117/hovercard">#30117</a>).</li> <li><strong>FlashInfer autotune</strong>: now covers draft-model graphs (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29595" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29595/hovercard">#29595</a>).</li> </ul> <p><strong>New Model Support</strong>: <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Tencent/Hy3" rel="nofollow">Hunyuan 3 (Hy3)</a>, Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM-Text), NVIDIA LocateAnything-3B, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Baidu/Unlimited-OCR" rel="nofollow">Baidu Unlimited-OCR</a>, <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/JoyEcho/JoyEcho" rel="nofollow">JoyEcho</a> multi-shot A/V, plus <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Qwen/Qwen3.6" rel="nofollow">Qwen3.6</a> NVFP4 support.</p> <p><strong>Native web search (Exa)</strong>: Built-in <code>web_search</code> support backed by Exa (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29342" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29342/hovercard">#29342</a>).</p> <p><strong>Breakable CUDA Graph on by default</strong>: Breakable CUDA Graph is now the default capture path, reducing per-step kernel-launch overhead (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29458" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29458/hovercard">#29458</a>); full CUDA Graph support for the prefill phase lands as experimental (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27988" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27988/hovercard">#27988</a>).</p> <p><strong>Linear-attention kernels (KDA / GDN)</strong>: New FlashKDA prefill backend for safe-gate KDA linear attention (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29472" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29472/hovercard">#29472</a>), plus ReplaySSM buffered output-only decode for linear attention (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28451" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28451/hovercard">#28451</a>).</p> <p><strong>FlashInfer A2A for routed MoE</strong>: Adds FlashInfer all-to-all with the <code>flashinfer_trtllm_routed</code> MoE runner (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22394" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22394/hovercard">#22394</a>).</p> <p><strong>DeepSeek-V4 Optimization</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Optimizes C128 state-pool allocation using the request state pool (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28612" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28612/hovercard">#28612</a>).</li> <li>FlashMLA sparse prefill is now enabled by default for DeepSeek-V4, reaching &gt;10% throghput gain on long context. (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29775" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29775/hovercard">#29775</a>).</li> <li>Non paged indexer support for long context prefill, with &gt;5% e2e throughput gain.(<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29619" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29619/hovercard">#29619</a>).</li> </ul> <p><strong>Decode Context Parallelism</strong>: decode context parallelism lands for MLA models, including DeepSeek V3 and Kimi K2 series (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/14194" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/14194/hovercard">#14194</a>).</p> <p><strong>Dependency upgrades</strong>: <code>transformers</code> bumped to 5.12.1 (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29393" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29393/hovercard">#29393</a>); <code>tvm-ffi</code> / <code>sgl-deep-gemm</code> / <code>tilelang</code> upgraded (<a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29554" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29554/hovercard">#29554</a>).<br> and . See the <a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/DeepSeek/DeepSeek-V4" rel="nofollow">DeepSeek-V4 cookbook</a>.</p> <p><em>Full release notes by category below.</em></p> <h2>New Model Support</h2> <ul> <li>Hunyuan 3 (Hy3): <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30201" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30201/hovercard">#30201</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Tencent/Hy3" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM-Text): <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27887" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27887/hovercard">#27887</a></li> <li>NVIDIA LocateAnything-3B: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28958" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/28958/hovercard">#28958</a></li> <li>Baidu Unlimited-OCR: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29186" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29186/hovercard">#29186</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Baidu/Unlimited-OCR" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>JoyEcho multi-shot A/V: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27420" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27420/hovercard">#27420</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/diffusion/JoyEcho/JoyEcho" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>)</li> <li>Qwen3.6 ModelOpt mixed NVFP4: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27906" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27906/hovercard">#27906</a>, <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29905" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29905/hovercard">#29905</a> (<a href="https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/Qwen/Qwen3.6" rel="nofollow">cookbook</a>) ⭐</li> </ul> <h2>GLM-5.2</h2> <ul> <li>[BCG][GLM5] perf: BCG support and prefill enhancements: <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27053" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/sgl-project/sglang/pull/27053/hovercard">#27053</a> ⭐</li> <li>[CI] Add GLM52 NVFP4 MTP B200 tests: <a |  | v1.3.0rc18 | 2026 | TensorRT-LLM releases | <ul> <li> <p>Known Issues</p> <ul> <li>DSV3.2 will crash with an IMA in various long-running perf tests on GB200/GB300 when the CuteDSL MoE backend is used. Work around this issue by using another MoE backend.</li> </ul> </li> <li> <p>Model Support</p> <ul> <li>Support Nemotron-H NVFP4 checkpoint on Hopper (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" |  | Triton 3.5.0 release | 2025 | Triton releases | <h1>Triton Release Notes</h1> <h2>Table of Contents</h2> <ul> <li><a href="#dialect--frontend">Dialect &amp; Frontend</a></li> <li><a href="#backend--compiler">Backend &amp; Compiler</a></li> <li><a href="#amdhip-backend">AMD/HIP Backend</a></li> <li><a href="#nvidia-backend">NVIDIA Backend</a></li> <li><a href="#gluon--layout-improvements">Gluon &amp; Layout Improvements</a></li> <li><a href="#kernels--benchmarks">Kernels &amp; Benchmarks</a></li> <li><a href="#testing--ci">Testing &amp; CI</a></li> <li><a href="#build--infrastructure">Build &amp; Infrastructure</a></li> <li><a href="#documentation">Documentation</a></li> <li><a href="#breaking-changes">Breaking Changes</a></li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Dialect &amp; Frontend</h2> <h3>New Features</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Warp Specialization Enhancements</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3364950847" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8005" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8005/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8005">#8005</a>): Made warp specialization require at least 4 warps with proper error messaging to prevent compiler crashes</li> <li><strong>Ragged TMA Support</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3301909075" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7792" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7792/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7792">#7792</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3294211024" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7783" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7783/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7783">#7783</a>): Added support for write-only and general ragged TMAs with automatic bounds checking using higher-dimensional TMA descriptors</li> <li><strong>Device Assert Mask Support</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3335667259" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7905" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7905/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7905">#7905</a>): Added <code>mask</code> parameter to <code>tl.device_assert</code> for easier debugging with masked operations</li> <li><strong>Padding Option for TMA Loads</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3361365155" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7993" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7993/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7993">#7993</a>): Added support for padding option (including NaN) in TMA descriptor creation and fallback paths</li> <li><strong>Implicit Downcast in TMA Descriptor Store</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="2929845832" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/6236" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/6236/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/6236">#6236</a>): Fixed missing implicit downcast when storing blocks through TMA descriptors</li> <li><strong>Mutations Disallowed</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3289998170" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7762" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7762/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7762">#7762</a>): Disabled all mutations to address semantic issues in the language</li> <li><strong>Specialized Recursion</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3220915174" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7468" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7468/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7468">#7468</a>): Enabled functions to recurse on specialized versions of themselves</li> <li><strong>Constexpr Function Cache Invalidation</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3305511783" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7802" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7802/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7802">#7802</a>): Reworked <code>constexpr_function</code> to support cache invalidation and capability checks</li> </ul> <h3>Bug Fixes</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Floating Point Argument Passing</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3215194713" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7439" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7439/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7439">#7439</a>): Fixed floating point argument passing for <code>tl.float16</code> and other FP types</li> <li><strong>Non-Associative Reduce Rematerialization</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3168518148" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7272" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7272/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7272">#7272</a>): Avoided rematerialization for non-associative reduce operations to prevent data consistency issues</li> <li><strong>PDL Issue Fix</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3195520519" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7379" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7379/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7379">#7379</a>): Fixed PDL-related issues in the frontend</li> <li><strong>Constexpr in Tuples</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3216138918" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7442" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7442/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7442">#7442</a>): Improved handling of constexpr in tuples, fixing type mismatches and in-place mutations</li> <li><strong>Loop Carry Detection</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3152711698" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7200" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7200/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7200">#7200</a>): Improved detection of loop carries when <code>@builtin</code> or <code>@core.extern</code> functions modify their arguments</li> <li><strong>Liveouts in Conditionals</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3176715723" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7318" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7318/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7318">#7318</a>): Fixed detection of liveouts in conditional blocks</li> </ul> <h3>Improvements</h3> <ul> <li><strong>MLIR Verifier After Parsing</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3364154661" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7999" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7999/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7999">#7999</a>): Run MLIR verifier after parsing to catch errors early</li> <li><strong>Better Error for num_cta &gt; 1 on sm &lt; 90</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3309538418" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7812" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7812/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7812">#7812</a>): Improved error messaging for unsupported configurations</li> <li><strong>Extern Elementwise Type Handling</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3342437341" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7930" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7930/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7930">#7930</a>): Fixed mismatched type handling for <code>core.extern_elementwise</code></li> <li><strong>Libdevice Exposure in Gluon</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3329176157" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7890" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7890/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7890">#7890</a>): Exposed libdevice functions with improved layout propagation</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Backend &amp; Compiler</h2> <h3>LLVM Updates</h3> <ul> <li><strong>LLVM Bump</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3326734037" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7881" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7881/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7881">#7881</a>): Updated to <a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/bc773632355b/hovercard" href="https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/bc773632355b">llvm/llvm-project@<tt>bc773632355b</tt></a> with multiple API changes including: <ul> <li>Switched <code>Constant{Int/Float}Op</code> type and value order</li> <li>Provided triple for <code>TargetLibraryInfoImpl</code></li> <li>Fixed atomic sync scope for NVIDIA</li> <li>Updated MLIR lib names and ops</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h3>Code Generation</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Generic Swizzling for convert_layout</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3100851860" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/6982" Disallowed</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3289998170" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7762" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7762/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7762">#7762</a>): All mutations are now disabled in the language</li> <li><strong>Min Dot Sizes</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3210624350" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7411" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7411/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7411">#7411</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3217957819" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7451" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7451/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7451">#7451</a>): Relaxed minimum dot size requirements (may affect autotuning)</li> <li><strong>Constexpr Handling</strong>: Changed how constexprs are included in cache keys (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3184373343" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7348" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7348/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7348">#7348</a>)</li> <li><strong>Environment Variables</strong>: <ul> <li>Only check <code>TRITON_DEBUG</code> at import time (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3290756843" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7767" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7767/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7767">#7767</a>)</li> <li>Removed getattr overhead from DriverConfig and CompiledKernel (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3290803896" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7770" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7770/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7770">#7770</a>)</li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Hook System Changes</strong>: <ul> <li>Renamed and changed signature for kernel load hooks (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3315189946" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7834" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7866">#7866</a>)</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h3>Removed Features</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Python 3.9 Support</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3431250906" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8222" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8287/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8287">#8287</a>): Cleaned up Python 3.9 related code</li> <li><strong>Nightly Installation</strong>: Removed from documentation</li> <li><strong>Local Prefetch Schedule</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3206822940" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7395" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7395/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7395">#7395</a>): Retired AMD local prefetch schedule hint variant</li> </ul> <h3>Deprecations</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Warp Size</strong>: Removed hardcoded warp size assumptions (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3164199726" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7253" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7253/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7253">#7253</a>)</li> <li><strong>GetShapePerCTA</strong>: Moving toward elimination in AMD backend (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3284910269" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7740" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7740/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7740">#7740</a>)</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Performance Improvements</h2> <h3>Measured Improvements</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Attention Kernels</strong>: Up to 785 TFLOPS for D64, 1230 TFLOPS for D128</li> <li><strong>MoE Routing</strong>: 30% faster (17.3us → 12.2us for fp16)</li> <li><strong>FP8 on Blackwell</strong>: ~1.9x speedup for large matmuls</li> <li><strong>Launch Overhead</strong>: Reduced by various optimizations (DriverConfig cleanup, etc.)</li> <li><strong>Compile Time</strong>: ~20% savings by skipping link_extern_libs when unnecessary (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3244672655" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7570" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7570/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7570">#7570</a>)</li> </ul> <h3>Optimization Techniques</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Register Pressure</strong>: Better management through tmem alloc hoisting</li> <li><strong>Vectorization</strong>: Improved through generic swizzling and layout optimizations</li> <li><strong>Bank Conflicts</strong>: Minimized through optimized shared memory layouts</li> <li><strong>Instruction Scheduling</strong>: Better code generation for linear layouts</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Notable Bug Fixes</h2> <h3>Correctness Issues</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Non-Associative Reduce</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3168518148" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7272" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7272/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7272">#7272</a>): Fixed rematerialization causing incorrect results</li> <li><strong>Atomic Operations</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3219770196" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7460" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7460/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7460">#7460</a>): Fixed broadcasting for atomic_cas and rmw operations</li> <li><strong>Memory Model</strong>: Multiple fixes for proper fence insertion and synchronization</li> <li><strong>FP8 Conversions</strong>: Fixed numerous rounding and clamping issues</li> <li><strong>TMA Operations</strong>: Fixed various edge cases in TMA load/store</li> </ul> <h3>Crash Fixes</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Warp Specialization</strong>: Fixed iterator invalidation and use-after-free issues</li> <li><strong>AMD OptimizeLDS</strong>: Fixed nullptr crash</li> <li><strong>Memory Leaks</strong>: Fixed in TritonNvidiaGPU InterleaveTMem.cpp (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3341783011" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7924" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7924/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7924">#7924</a>)</li> <li><strong>Nullptr Access</strong>: Fixed in AMD pingpong ChainedDot (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3272954296" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7694" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7694/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7694">#7694</a>)</li> </ul> <h3>Regression Fixes</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Block Size Logic Revert</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" many individual contributors</li> </ul> <p>Special thanks to all contributors who submitted bug reports, feature requests, and code improvements!</p> | class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3553369295" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8542" <code>ast.Num</code></li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Backend &amp; Compiler</h2> <h3>LLVM Updates</h3> <ul> <li><strong>LLVM Bump</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8186">#8186</a>): Added Triton Conference 2025 details to README</li> <li><strong>Conference Registration</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3396276476" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8114" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8114/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8114">#8114</a>): Added conference registration link</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Breaking Changes</h2> <h3>API Changes</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Constexpr Through min/max</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3627319401" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8733" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8733/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8733">#8733</a>): BC-breaking propagation of constexpr through builtin min/max</li> <li><strong>Aggregate Cache Keys</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3560168628" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8568" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8568/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8568">#8568</a>): Aggregate members are now added to the cache key</li> <li><strong>warp_specialize Argument Tuples</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3482551290" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8368" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8368/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8368">#8368</a>): Required warp_specialize default_args and worker_args to be tuples</li> <li><strong>warp_specialize API Change</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3550267443" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8527" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8527/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8527">#8527</a>): Changed <code>gl.warp_specialize</code> API</li> </ul> <h3>Proton Changes</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Metric ValueId Types</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3357610153" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7979" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7979/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7979">#7979</a>): BC-break - Prevent updating the same metric valueId with different types</li> </ul> <h3>Removed Features</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Python 3.9 Support</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3431250906" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8222" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8222/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8222">#8222</a>): Removed Python 3.9 support, minimum is now 3.10</li> <li><strong>CentOS 7 Build</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3419632891" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8191" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8191/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8191">#8191</a>): Removed CentOS 7 build support</li> <li><strong>GlobalPrefetch/LocalPrefetch Knobs</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3455546000" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8295" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8295/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8295">#8295</a>): Removed GlobalPrefetch and LocalPrefetch Knobs for AMD</li> </ul> <h3>Deprecations</h3> <ul> <li><strong>triton_kernels.routing</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3485181579" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8375" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8375/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8375">#8375</a>): Deprecated triton_kernels.routing in favor of BitmatrixMetadata</li> <li><strong>Custom Topological Sort</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3570984797" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8596" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8596/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8596">#8596</a>): Deprecated triton's custom topological sort</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Performance Improvements</h2> <h3>Compilation Performance</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Native Specialization</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3290852665" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7771" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8689">#8689</a>): Improved compilation time in constant sanitizer</li> </ul> <h3>Runtime Performance</h3> <ul> <li><strong>MXFP Conversions</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3576789755" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8610" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3520105247" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8448" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8448/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8448">#8448</a>): New expert parallelism implementation</li> </ul> <h3>Memory Optimizations</h3> <ul> <li><strong>BypassLDS</strong> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3352603644" data-permission-text="Title is private" includes contributions from engineers at:</p> <ul> <li>Meta</li> <li>AMD</li> <li>NVIDIA</li> <li>OpenAI</li> <li>Intel</li> <li>Google</li> <li>And many individual contributors</li> </ul> <p>Special thanks to all contributors who submitted bug reports, feature requests, and code improvements!</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/v3.6.0) |

<li><a href="#contributors">Contributors</a></li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Dialect &amp; Frontend</h2> <h3>New Features</h3> <ul> <li><strong><code>tl.squeeze</code> / <code>tl.unsqueeze</code></strong>: Added <code>tl.squeeze</code> and <code>tl.unsqueeze</code> operations to the standard library (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3702292486" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8924" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8924/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8924">#8924</a>)</li> <li><strong>Scaled BMM</strong>: Added support for scaled batched matmul in the frontend (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3733454684" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9000" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9000/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9000">#9000</a>)</li> <li><strong>FP8 Constants</strong>: Frontend can now create FP8 constants directly (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3688485514" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8882" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8882/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8882">#8882</a>)</li> <li><strong>Returning Constexpr from JIT</strong>: Functions can return <code>constexpr</code> values from JIT-compiled code (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3648088950" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8785" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8785/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8785">#8785</a>)</li> <li><strong><code>get_int_attr</code> for Out-of-Tree Walk</strong>: Added <code>get_int_attr</code> to <code>Operation</code> to support out-of-tree IR walks (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3690720555" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8892" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8951" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8951/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9243">#9243</a>)</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Breaking Changes</h2> <ul> <li><strong><code>triton_kernels</code> matmul refactor (BC-breaking)</strong>: The matrix-multiplication refactor introduces a backwards-incompatible API surface. Downstream users of <code>triton_kernels.matmul_*</code> should review call sites (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3640560935" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8765" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8765/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8765">#8765</a>)</li> <li><strong><code>tcgen05.cp</code> Lowering Generalization &amp; <code>tcgen05.mma</code> Encoding Acceptance</strong>: Continued from 3.6, with new verifier behavior and stricter encoding checks.</li> <li><strong>Proton <code>GlobalScratchAllocOp</code> Deprecated</strong>: Replaced with TritonGPU's <code>GlobalScratchAllocOp</code> + custom backend. Out-of-tree consumers must migrate (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3724661544" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/8976" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/8976/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/8976">#8976</a>)</li> <li><strong><code>make_block_ptr</code> Deprecated</strong>: A deprecation warning is now emitted; users should migrate to tensor descriptors (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4035814509" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9667" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9667/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9667">#9667</a>)</li> <li><strong>Default 32-bit Dot Precision Reverted</strong>: Default 32-bit dot precision was briefly TF32x3 — the default in 3.7 remains as in 3.6. Note the new "round f32→tf32 in descriptor" option (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3755089202" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9080" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9080/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9080">#9080</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3757798223" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9090" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9090/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9090">#9090</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3849821044" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9295" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9295/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9295">#9295</a>)</li> <li><strong>AsyncCopy Default for gfx950 / gfx1250</strong>: Was enabled by default and then reverted on the release branch. Users must opt in explicitly in 3.7 (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3756865328" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9087" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9087/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9087">#9087</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3933074053" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9445" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9445/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9445">#9445</a>)</li> <li><strong>SM89 ptxas Workaround Reverted</strong>: The ptxas workaround introduced earlier is removed on release/3.7.x (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4091853413" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9756" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9756/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9756">#9756</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3121517936" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/7067" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/7067/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/7067">#7067</a>)</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Contributors</h2> <p>This release includes contributions from engineers at:</p> <ul> <li>Meta</li> <li>AMD</li> <li>NVIDIA</li> <li>OpenAI</li> <li>Intel</li> <li>Google</li> <li>And many individual contributors</li> </ul> <p>Special thanks to all contributors who submitted bug reports, feature requests, and code improvements!</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/v3.7.0) |
|  | Triton 3.7.1 Release Notes | 2026 | Triton releases | <p>Triton 3.7.1 is a patch release on top of 3.7.0. It fixes the following 2 regressions and contains no new features or API changes.</p> <h2>Regression fixes</h2> <ul> <li>Add async read dependencies to FenceAsync — a missing fence between a shared-memory store (st.shared) and an async copy_local_to_global could let the async copy read shared memory before the store completed, producing incorrect results. FenceAsync now inserts the required fence. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4005243114" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/9610" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/9610/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/9610">#9610</a>)</li> <li>[InstCombine] Shrink added constant using LHS known zeros — fixes an LLVM InstCombine miscompilation where add simplification used known-zero bits only from the RHS, mishandling the symmetric case where the LHS has known zeros and the low bits are unused. Picked up by Triton through its pinned LLVM. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3780919128" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/174380" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/llvm/llvm-project/pull/174380/hovercard" href="https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/174380">llvm/llvm-project#174380</a>)</li> </ul> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/v3.7.1) |
|  | gfx950-tutorial-v0.1 | 2026 | Triton releases | <p>gfx950 tutorial pin: LLIR scheduler + amdgcnas (no extra optimizations)</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/gfx950-tutorial-v0.1) |
|  | gfx950-tutorial-v0.2: gfx950 Gluon tutorial v0.2 | 2026 | Triton releases | <p>LLIR scheduler + amdgcnas + RA-hints, rebased onto upstream main. Adds<br> MMRA-fence-aware barrier handling (keeps release/acquire fences glued to the<br> s.barrier) and decouples the LLVM misched-disable from the env var (driven off<br> whether the LLIR scheduler actually ran). Companion to the gfx950-gluon-tutorials<br> repo at tag gfx950-tutorial-v0.2.</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/gfx950-tutorial-v0.2) |
|  | gfx950-tutorial-v0.3: gfx950 Gluon tutorial v0.3 | 2026 | Triton releases | <p>LLIR scheduler + amdgcnas + RA-hints, rebased onto upstream main (<a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/commit/63a5e1f0e91a2376edae52d32e8880df2cf2257b/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/commit/63a5e1f0e91a2376edae52d32e8880df2cf2257b"><tt>63a5e1f</tt></a>).<br> Adds MMRA-fence-aware barrier handling (keeps release/acquire fences glued to<br> the s.barrier) and decouples the LLVM misched-disable from the env var (driven<br> off whether the LLIR scheduler actually ran). Companion to the<br> gfx950-gluon-tutorials repo at tag gfx950-tutorial-v0.3.</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/gfx950-tutorial-v0.3) |
|  | gfx950-tutorial-v1.0: gfx950 Gluon tutorial v1.0 | 2026 | Triton releases | <p>Out-of-tree LLIR scheduler + amdgcnas plugins. Removes the in-tree LLIR<br> scheduler and amdgcnas post-assembly tool (now shipped as plugins in the<br> gfx950-gluon-tutorials repo) and keeps only the plugin-enabling hooks: the<br> LLVM_PASS_PLUGIN_KEEP_TARGET_MACHINE gate that preserves the TargetMachine for<br> out-of-tree LLVM pass plugins, and the TRITON_FORCE_MFMA_AGPR flag that forces<br> AGPR-form MFMA accumulators (sets amdgpu-mfma-vgpr-form=0 in llvm.cc; the paired<br> amdgpu-agpr-alloc=256 is a kernel llvm_fn_attrs compile option). Companion to<br> the gfx950-gluon-tutorials repo at tag gfx950-tutorial-v1.0.</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/gfx950-tutorial-v1.0) |
|  | gfx950-tutorial-v1.1: gfx950 tutorial pin v1.1 | 2026 | Triton releases | <p>Rebased onto upstream triton main with the merged warp-pipeline PR <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4852987744" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/10840" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/10840/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/10840">#10840</a><br> (always-on sched.barrier after each stage's memory ops,<br> SchedGroupMask::non_mem_non_sideeffect). Drops the tutorial's local<br> fence_loads/keep_order commits (superseded by <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4852987744" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/issues/10840" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/triton-lang/triton/pull/10840/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/pull/10840">#10840</a>); keeps the out-of-tree<br> LLIR-scheduler / amdgcnas plugin infra. LLVM pin: 62b7cf96 -&gt; <a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/commit/850a2b1b7af7d7ad277084f41581cc180ffed703/hovercard" href="https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/commit/850a2b1b7af7d7ad277084f41581cc180ffed703"><tt>850a2b1</tt></a>.</p> | [primary](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/releases/tag/gfx950-tutorial-v1.1) |
|  | v1.1.0 | 2026 | NVIDIA Inference Xfer Library (NIXL) releases | <h1>1.1.0</h1> <h2>Summary</h2> <p>The NVIDIA® NIXL Release 1.1.0 introduces a high-throughput dispatch/combine kernel path for the NIXL-EP example program and modernizes the telemetry data model for production-scale deployments. A new dedicated <code>nixl_ep_ht.cu</code> kernel set ships alongside the renamed low-latency <code>nixl_ep_ll.cu</code>, paired with a VMM-based device memory allocator and elastic-scaling fixes covering destruction flows, non-consecutive rank topologies, and signaling-buffer corruption during scale-up, while the core plugin manager now defers backend loading until first use to reduce agent startup cost. Telemetry consumers must adopt two breaking changes -- the public event signature drops its <code>timestamp</code> field, and the Prometheus exporter migrates <code>agent_xfer_time</code> / <code>agent_xfer_post_time</code> from <code>Gauge</code> to <code>Counter</code>, suffixes counters with <code>_total</code>, and removes the per-backend metric category in favor of standardized transfer, performance, and memory categories. <strong>Downstream consumers should also switch their <code>requirements.txt</code> from <code>nixl[cu12]</code> / <code>nixl[cu13]</code> to plain <code>nixl</code></strong> -- the meta wheel now bundles both CUDA backends and auto-selects at runtime based on <code>torch.version.cuda</code> (see [API Changes]).</p> <p>NIXL 1.1.0 also delivers significant networking, storage, and backend improvements. The Libfabric backend extends NUMA-aware rail selection to additional EC2 instance topologies, adds completion-queue locking for <code>FI_THREAD_COMPLETION</code> semantics, and resolves multi-GPU memory registration and notification-override regressions on transfer-handle repost. A new Dell ObjectScale S3-over-RDMA accelerated engine joins the OBJ plugin for high-bandwidth object storage, UCX now raises an explicit error when VRAM is misclassified as host memory, and <code>nixlbench</code> adds Neuron (Trainium/Inferentia) device support. Across core transfer paths, batched insertion of sorted descriptor lists and a bounded in-memory telemetry buffer contribute to lower per-request overhead and predictable memory behavior in long-running agents.</p> <h2>Major Features</h2> <ul> <li><strong>NIXL-EP High-Throughput Kernels:</strong> Added a new high-throughput dispatch/combine kernel path (<code>examples/device/ep/csrc/kernels/nixl_ep_ht.cu</code>) alongside the renamed low-latency <code>nixl_ep_ll.cu</code>, with matching <code>test_ht.py</code> coverage and configurable GPU timeouts so the example can be tuned for production-scale runs. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3956458740" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1341" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1341/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1341">#1341</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4218830363" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1503" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1503/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1503">#1503</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4250197685" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1520" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1520/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1520">#1520</a>)</li> <li><strong>Plugin Manager: Deferred Plugin Loading:</strong> Plugins are now loaded the first time they are actually used instead of at agent construction. Reduces agent startup cost when only a subset of plugins is exercised and removes dead code from the telemetry path. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4282903816" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1546" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1546/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1546">#1546</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4304677775" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1564" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1564/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1564">#1564</a>)</li> <li><strong>Dell ObjectScale S3-over-RDMA Engine:</strong> New accelerated S3 engine under <code>src/plugins/obj/s3_accel/dell/</code> (with tests) that talks to Dell ObjectScale over RDMA via a dedicated client. Wired into <code>obj_backend.cpp</code> and exercised through <code>test/gtest/unit/obj/</code>. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3938207719" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1327" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1327/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1327">#1327</a>)</li> </ul> <h2>API Changes</h2> <ul> <li> <p><strong>[Telemetry] Prometheus Exporter Migration:</strong> Removed the <code>NIXL_TELEMETRY_BACKEND</code> event category and <code>createOrUpdateBackendEvent()</code>. Counters are now registered with a <code>_total</code> suffix to match Prometheus naming conventions, and the <code>agent_xfer_time</code> / <code>agent_xfer_post_time</code> metrics moved from <code>Gauge</code> to <code>Counter</code>. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3926561490" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1308" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1308/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1308">#1308</a>)</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>[Telemetry] Event Signature Cleanup:</strong> Removed the public <code>timestamp</code> field from <code>nixlTelemetryEvent</code>, simplified <code>backend_engine.h</code> and <code>telemetry_plugin.h</code> signatures, and tightened the <code>buffer_plugin</code> API. Downstream consumers must update event-construction sites. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4254649880" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1522" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1522/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1522">#1522</a>)</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>[Packaging] Switch downstream installs from <code>nixl[cu12]</code> / <code>nixl[cu13]</code> to plain <code>nixl</code>:</strong> <strong>Action required: update your <code>requirements.txt</code> (or <code>pyproject.toml</code> / <code>setup.py</code>) to depend on <code>nixl</code> instead of <code>nixl[cu12]</code> or <code>nixl[cu13]</code>.</strong> The <code>nixl</code> meta wheel on PyPI now installs both <code>nixl-cu12</code> and <code>nixl-cu13</code> backends in a single step and selects the correct one at runtime from <code>torch.version.cuda</code>. The <code>[cu12]</code> / <code>[cu13]</code> extras are still accepted as no-op aliases so existing pins keep working, but new installs should drop the extra.</p> <p><strong><code>torch</code> is a mandatory runtime dependency and must be installed from the PyTorch index matching your CUDA driver, either before <code>nixl</code> or in the same <code>pip install</code> invocation.</strong> nixl declares torch as a dependency, but the default PyPI torch is CPU-only; pass <code>--index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130</code> (or the appropriate CUDA variant) so pip resolves a CUDA-enabled build. At import nixl time the meta package reads <code>torch.version.cuda</code> to select between the bundled <code>nixl-cu12</code> and <code>nixl-cu13</code> backends. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4316084329" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1574" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1574/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1574">#1574</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4319129960" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1578" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1578/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1578">#1578</a>)</p> </li> </ul> <h2>Enhancements</h2> <h3>Performance</h3> <ul> <li><strong>[Core] Batch Insertion for Sorted Descriptor Lists:</strong> Added a batched insert path in <code>nixl_descriptors.cpp</code> / <code>nixl_memory_section.cpp</code> so registering large descriptor lists no longer pays the per-element ordered-insert cost. New <code>sec_desc_list</code> gtest covers the path. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4180561749" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1479" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1479/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1479">#1479</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Core] Deferred Plugin Loading:</strong> See Major Features. Avoids parsing/loading unused backends at agent startup. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4282903816" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1546" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1546/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1546">#1546</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4304677775" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1564" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1564/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1564">#1564</a>)</li> </ul> <h3>Networking &amp; Backend</h3> <ul> <li><strong>[Libfabric] NUMA-Aware Rail Selection on Additional Instance Types:</strong> Extended the rail-manager / topology code paths to recognize more EC2 instance topologies (including <code>c5n.18xlarge</code>), warn cleanly when no policy applies, and keep the NUMA-aware policy from regressing on hardware it has not been tuned for. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4147587539" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1461" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1461/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1461">#1461</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Libfabric] Endpoint Locking for <code>FI_THREAD_COMPLETION</code>:</strong> Expanded the CQ mutex to cover endpoint-bound posting operations, and skip in-line CQ progress when the dedicated progress thread is enabled. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4130172610" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1457" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1457/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1457">#1457</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Libfabric] Active Rail Tracking:</strong> Reworked <code>libfabric_rail_manager</code> reference counting and added a sizable mock/unit-test harness (<code>libfabric_mock_stubs.h</code>, <code>rail_active_refcount_test.cpp</code>) so rail activation/deactivation is now covered by tests. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4234208159" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1510" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1510/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1510">#1510</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Libfabric] Multi-GPU Memory Registration:</strong> Restored the original two-<code>if</code> registration pattern in <code>libfabric_backend.cpp</code> and downgraded the multi-GPU detection log from WARN to INFO. Validated end-to-end with <code>nixlbench --scheme tp --mode MG</code>. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4228056856" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1506" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1506/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1506">#1506</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Libfabric] EFA Hardware Warning:</strong> Emit a clear warning when EFA hardware is present but the LIBFABRIC backend is not in use, plus new <code>hw_warning_test</code> coverage. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="3907178555" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1287" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1287/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1287">#1287</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Libfabric] Log-Level Cleanup in EFA Path:</strong> Reclassified noisy WARN messages and added an <code>Accelerator-PCI</code> prefix to topology-mapping INFO logs for context. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4147803835" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1462" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1462/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1462">#1462</a>)</li> <li><strong>[UCX] Disable Emulated RMA Protocols:</strong> On UCX &gt;= 1.21, force <code>PROTO_EMULATION_ENABLE=n</code> and pin <code>IB_TX_INLINE_RESP=0</code> in <code>ucx_utils.cpp</code> so the backend refuses to fall back to software-emulated RMA -- transfers either run over true RDMA or fail fast instead of silently degrading. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4377649981" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1611" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1611/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1611">#1611</a>)</li> <li><strong>[UCX] Timeout Warning on Device Memory List Creation:</strong> Added a configurable timeout warning in <code>mem_list.cpp</code> so slow VRAM registrations surface visibly instead of hanging silently. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4034970195" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1410" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1410/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1410">#1410</a>)</li> <li><strong>[UCX] Plugin Cleanup:</strong> Removed an unused <code>ucx_backend</code> class field. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4238220382" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1512" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1512/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1512">#1512</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Mooncake] Dependency Bump:</strong> Updated the Mooncake submodule/build to v0.3.9, including matching CI matrix entries. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4105582784" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1448" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1448/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1448">#1448</a>)</li> </ul> <h3>NIXL Expert Parallelism (EP)</h3> <ul> <li><strong>VMM API for Device Memory Allocation:</strong> Added a new <code>vmm.cpp</code> / <code>vmm.hpp</code> layer so the NIXL-EP example uses the CUDA VMM API instead of plain <code>cudaMalloc</code> for its device buffers. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4041684386" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1415" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1415/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1415">#1415</a>)</li> <li><strong>CUDA Graph Reuse Across Elastic Scaling:</strong> The low-latency dispatch/combine kernel path now reuses its CUDA graphs across elastic scale up/down instead of rebuilding them on every rank change. <code>Buffer.connect_ranks</code> gains an <code>activate=False</code> option (LL mode only) so newly connected ranks can be staged masked and activated later via <code>update_mask_buffer</code>. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4328163967" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1584" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1584/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1584">#1584</a>)</li> <li><strong>High-Throughput Follow-Up Fixes:</strong> Removed a redundant count buffer, fixed internode destruction flows, re-guarded <code>p2p_ptr_get</code> with <code>is_rank_masked</code>, and merged duplicated <code>!low_latency_mode</code> blocks. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4218830363" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1503" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1503/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1503">#1503</a>)</li> <li><strong>Robust Destruction Flows:</strong> Deregister buffers before <code>cudaFree</code>, fix disconnect rank ordering, skip remote <code>prepMemView</code> when there are no peers, and warn (rather than throw) on destructor failures. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4090057599" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1430" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1430/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1430">#1430</a>)</li> <li><strong>Non-Consecutive Rank Support:</strong> Move <code>p2p_ptr_get</code> calls inside the rank-mask guard so configurations like ranks <code>[0, 2]</code> no longer dereference uninitialized P2P mappings. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4179825628" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1478" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1478/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1478">#1478</a>)</li> <li><strong>Signaling Buffer Corruption on Elastic Scale-Up:</strong> Size the signaling region for the maximum expert count so growing <code>num_experts</code> no longer overlaps with send/recv data. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4117188063" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1451" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1451/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1451">#1451</a>)</li> <li><strong>Planned-SIGTERM Handling in Elastic Test:</strong> <code>elastic.py</code> now recognizes the intentional SIGTERM injected to simulate rank failure and does not flag those workers as errors. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4217273065" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1500" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1500/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1500">#1500</a>)</li> <li><strong>GCC <code>maybe-uninitialized</code> Fix in <code>ht_dispatch</code>:</strong> Switched to raw pointers in ternary expressions matching the existing <code>recv_topk_*</code> pattern so <code>-Werror=maybe-uninitialized</code> no longer fails the example build. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4256231406" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1525" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1525/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1525">#1525</a>)</li> <li><strong>Cleanup:</strong> Removed an unused variable in the EP CSRS kernels. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4233199761" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1508" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1508/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1508">#1508</a>)</li> </ul> <h4>Limitations</h4> <ul> <li><strong>Cross-NVL-domain runs are not supported in this release.</strong> Launching NIXL EP across nodes that belong to different NVLink domains (for example, with SLURM <code>--segment 1</code>, or any allocation that spans NVL blocks) will fail during connection setup.</li> </ul> <h3>Packaging &amp; Distribution</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Unified Meta Wheel + CUDA-Matched Torch:</strong> Implementation side of the <code>pip install nixl</code> simplification described under API Changes. Adds a <code>-Drelease_wheel=true</code> meson option (<code>meson_options.txt</code>, <code>nixl-meta/meson.build</code>, <code>pyproject.toml.in</code>) that toggles the unified meta wheel for release builds vs. a single-backend wheel for source builds; the manylinux Dockerfile emits the meta wheel only on the cu12 pass since it is identical for cu12/cu13; the vLLM and SGLang Dockerfiles drop their per-CUDA wheel-selection logic; and <code>.gitlab/build.sh</code> installs the CUDA-matched PyTorch wheel instead of whatever default <code>torch</code> shipped with the other dev dependencies. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4316084329" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1574" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1574/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1574">#1574</a>)</li> <li><strong>Inference Image Dockerfiles:</strong> Added <code>contrib/Dockerfile.vllm</code> and <code>contrib/Dockerfile.sglang</code> for downstream inference-stack consumers. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4179816877" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1477" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1477/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1477">#1477</a>)</li> <li><strong>Enable UCX-EP Support in Python Wheel:</strong> Wire UCX-EP into the wheel build and meson configuration so the published Python wheel ships with EP support. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4095997553" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1440" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1440/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1440">#1440</a>)</li> <li><strong>Disable <code>gdrcopy</code> in UCX Build:</strong> Drop <code>gdrcopy</code> from the UCX build dependency set across <code>contrib/Dockerfile</code>, <code>contrib/Dockerfile.manylinux</code>, and the nixlbench builder. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4092383915" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1436" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1436/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1436">#1436</a>)</li> </ul> <h3>Benchmarks</h3> <ul> <li><strong>[nixlbench] Neuron Support:</strong> <code>nixlbench</code> now allocates, deallocates, and consistency-checks VRAM segments on Neuron (Trainium/Inferentia) devices when CUDA is unavailable. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4124332339" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1454" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1454/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1454">#1454</a>)</li> <li><strong>[nixlbench] Pairwise SG Stats Scaling Fix:</strong> Skip the per-device-count multiplication of B/W in multi-rank single-group mode, so 8-device runs no longer report inflated throughput. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4207430278" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1495" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1495/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1495">#1495</a>)</li> <li><strong>[nixlbench] Worker Cleanup:</strong> Removed unused parameters across workers and the <code>worker.h</code> interface. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4087627536" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1426" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1426/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1426">#1426</a>)</li> <li><strong>[nixlbench] Pairwise Single-Group Stats Extension:</strong> Extend the statistics calculation condition to handle multiple initiator devices in pairwise single-group mode. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4032996348" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1407" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1407/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1407">#1407</a>)</li> </ul> <h2>Bugfixes</h2> <ul> <li><strong>[Core] Agent etcd Metadata Synchronization:</strong> Fixed incorrect synchronization with the etcd metadata communication thread (<code>agent_data.h</code>, <code>nixl_agent.cpp</code>, <code>nixl_listener.cpp</code>) so concurrent metadata exchange no longer races. (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4299170928" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1559" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1559/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1559">#1559</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4304624818" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/issues/1563" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1563/hovercard" href="https://github.com/ai-dynamo/nixl/pull/1563">#1563</a>)</li> <li><strong>[Core] <code>nixl_worker</code> File Offset Calculation:</strong> Restored the correct <code>file_offset += block_size</code> accounting for non-GUSLI plugins after the regression introduced by <code>62a5b3e</code>.
